parameters.responseBody: =={{ { ok: true, channel: "frontend", result: $json.result, jobName: $json.jobName, buildNumber: $json.buildNumber } }}
=={{ { ok: true, channel: "backend", result: $json.result, jobName: $json.jobName, buildNumber: $json.buildNumber } }}
=={{ { ok: true, skipped: true, reason: "not-built", result: $json.result, jobName: $json.jobName, buildNumber: $json.buildNumber } }}
